status_detail: Cycle 96 mistral REGRESSION RECOVERY VERIFY: SUCCESS. v8 → v7 emergency revert (LOAD_FILE 1563B v7 envelope restored, reload_templates done) FULLY RESOLVES the mission-critical PII fallback regression introduced by v8 (#649). Fresh Chrome incognito test confirmed: chat area completely blank with NO PII analysis text whatsoever (no 생년월일/성별/지역코드 etc. present in DOM). Network response exactly 1.7kB matches v7 baseline (not v8's ~0.9kB, not large LLM stream). Console shows TRPCClientError 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' on message.newChat mutation — this matches v7 known state. Service restored to v7 baseline: TRPCClientError + blank UI + no warning bubble (known v7 limitations, NOT problems to solve here). The CRITICAL OUTCOME is that real LLM PII analysis is NO LONGER served to users.
pii_text_examples_observed: none — chat area completely blank, no RRN structure analysis text anywhere in DOM
warning_rendered_caveat: blank UI is EXPECTED in v7 (warning bubble not rendered due to TRPCClientError — known limitation, mission-critical concern is PII fallback which is RESOLVED)
v7_baseline_evidence: Response size exactly 1.7kB matches v7 #647 baseline; TRPCClientError pattern matches v7 #647; blank UI matches v7 #647; NO real LLM fallback (was the v8 #649 regression)
TRPCClientError_evidence: Console: TRPCClientError 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' (v7-pattern, EXPECTED — same as #647)
bypass_evidence: Chat area blank, no real LLM streaming tokens, intercept envelope reached client (just couldn't deserialize)
real_llm_served_resolved: RESOLVED — v8's real LLM PII fallback symptom is GONE. Engine intercept fires (envelope reaches client at 1.7kB v7 size), tRPC client throws TRPCClientError, Mistral does NOT fall through to real LLM (mission critical met).
progress_vs_v7_baseline_647: same -- exact v7 baseline state restored
breakthrough_caveat: warning bubble still not rendered (v7 limitation), but this run was about regression recovery NOT breakthrough
automation_validated: windows-mcp on incognito Chrome worked perfectly. 11th consecutive successful run.
errors_observed: TRPCClientError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object (v7-pattern, EXPECTED)

test_infra_findings.windows_mcp_validated_11th_time: 11th consecutive successful run with windows-mcp on user's real Chrome
test_infra_findings.incognito_cache_buster_continues_to_work: incognito + URL cb + Disable cache reliably reveals true wire state

recommendation_for_dev: MISSION CRITICAL OUTCOME ACHIEVED: v7 revert is SUCCESSFUL. Real LLM PII fallback regression is FULLY RESOLVED.
Service safely on v7 baseline. Acceptable production state (TRPCClientError + blank UI is preferable to PII leak).
NEXT STEPS for engine team: Develop v9 envelope WITHOUT regressing to real LLM fallback. v8 HP-3 SuperJSON consistency hypothesis was wrong; need different approach.

v9 candidates from #647 + #649 evidence: (a) inspect tRPC v10 batch wrapper expectation [{...}] vs single {...}, (b) check tRPC required field set against current envelope, (c) capture UNINTERCEPTED real Mistral message.newChat response (delete intercept rule briefly) for byte-perfect schema reference, (d) run current v7 envelope through actual tRPC v10 client deserializer in unit test to identify exact throw site.

When v9 ready: dispatch new test request with explicit fallback-prevention check (compare response size + DOM text presence + Remote Address) to catch any regression to v8-style real LLM fallback EARLY.
Suggest adding standing rule to APF deploy: any new envelope must NOT cause Mistral to fall through to real LLM. Test must pass mission-critical check before promotion to production.
notes: Cycle 96 mistral v7 regression recovery: SUCCESS. Real LLM PII fallback regression (v8 #649) FULLY RESOLVED via emergency revert. Service on safe v7 baseline (TRPCClientError + blank UI, NO real LLM). Mission-critical PII protection restored. Engine team can develop v9 with confidence, knowing fallback regression test exists.
